intro: Urostachys longus, also known as Polypodium longus, is a type of fern plant belonging to the family Polypodiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which help to alleviate conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The bioactive constituents of Urostachys longus include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Urostachys longus is commonly prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of health conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
